ocr.text: In analyzing the policy retention rates and catastrophe loss reserves for Zurich Insurance, it is evident that both personal and
commercial lines are experiencing notable trends that impact overall financial stability.
PolicyRetentionRates  FY2024
Category  RetentionRate  Amount
PersonalLines  85%  $50M  CommercialLines
75%  [HIDDEN]  Total  77%
LifeInsurance  90%  [HIDDEN]  AutoInsurance
[HIDDEN]  $20M  HomeInsurance  87%
$25M  HealthInsurance  80%  $25M
Specifically, the retention rate for personal lines stands at a robust 82%, reflecting a strong customer loyalty and effective risk
management strategies.

CatastropheLossReserves  GrossReserves(USD)  NetReserves(USD)  ReportedLosses(USD)  ClaimPayments(USD)  ReserveDevelopment(USD)  LossRatio(%)  ExpenseRatio(%)  CombinedRatio(%)  UnderwritingIncome(USD)  InvestmentIncome(USD)

FiscalYear  2024  NorthAmerica  ZurichInsurance  TotalPremiums(USD)  TotalClaims(USD)  ClaimsIncurred(USD)  LossAdjustmentExpenses(USD)  ReserveStrengthening(USD)  ReserveReleases(USD)  NetIncome(USD)  TotalAssets(USD)
Casualty  $900M  [HIDDEN]  $500M  $450M  $80M  $30M  70%  22%  92%  [HIDDEN]  $10M
Reinsurance  $500M  [HIDDEN]  $300M  $250M  $50M  $15M  60%  [HIDDEN]  80%  $10M  $3M
This is particularly significant as it correlates with a total premium accumulation of $150M for the fiscal year 2024,
underscoring the importance of maintaining high retention levels in a competitive market. Furthermore, the company's
catastrophe loss reserves reveal critical insights, with the marine segment reflecting claims incurred of $5M, while the casualty
line demonstrates a net income of $30M. The total reserve strengthening for reinsurance in North America was recorded at
20%, indicating proactive measures to bolster financial resilience against unforeseen losses. Additionally, the North American
market is substantial, with total reserves amounting to $400M for reinsurance and $750M for casualty lines, which highlights
the scale of Zurich's operations in this region. Collectively, these metrics provide a comprehensive overview of Zurich
Insurance's performance, emphasizing the interplay between policy retention strategies and prudent reserve management in
navigating the complexities of the insurance landscape.
